summary: Public Profile V2 - Coach Scan Mode & Dynamic Recruiting Snapshot - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend (14/14 API tests) and Frontend UI tests verified the redesigned public profile with Coach Scan hero, recruiting_signals array, key facts grid, and signal pills.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: recruiting_signals includes division interest (e.g., 'Actively exploring D1, D2, and D3 opportunities')
VERIFIED: recruiting_signals includes 'Academic information available' when GPA exists
VERIFIED: recruiting_signals includes 'Profile updated this season' for recently updated profiles
VERIFIED: recruiting_signals are privacy-safe - no school names or pipeline counts exposed
VERIFIED: GET /api/internal/athlete/{athlete_id}/profile still works for staff
VERIFIED: Frontend Coach Scan section renders with name, class year badge, position, key facts
VERIFIED: Frontend Key Facts grid shows Height (5'10), Weight (145 lbs), GPA (3.8)
VERIFIED: Frontend Contact CTA button present in hero when email is available
VERIFIED: Frontend Recruiting Snapshot section shows signal pills below hero
VERIFIED: Frontend signal pills display correct text from backend
VERIFIED: Frontend Events section shows upcoming events
VERIFIED: Frontend 404 page for non-existent slug
VERIFIED: Internal staff profile shows Pipeline Status with 12 schools
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data (athlete_3) with slug 'emma-chen-2026-oh'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Profile V2 fully implemented and tested. The new features added: (1) Coach Scan Mode - scannable hero with name/class/position/height/GPA/club/measurables/CTAs, (2) Dynamic Recruiting Snapshot - recruiting_signals array with privacy-safe signals like division interest, academic info available, profile freshness. Emma Chen profile shows 3 signals: 'Actively exploring D1, D2, and D3 opportunities', 'Academic information available', 'Profile updated this season'. ScanFact and MeasurableChip components render key facts. Internal profile endpoint does NOT include recruiting_signals (uses recruiting_context instead with full pipeline details).

backend_recruiting_signals.division interest signal: PASS - 'Actively exploring D1, D2, and D3 opportunities'

frontend_recruiting_snapshot.signal-0: PASS - 'Actively exploring D1, D2, and D3 opportunities'
